code: import{useEffect,useState}from"react";import{useNavigate}from"react-router-dom";import"./styles/Books.css";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function BorrowedBooks(){const[books,setBooks]=useState([]);const navigate=useNavigate();useEffect(()=>{const stored=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("borrowedBooks"))||[];setBooks(stored);},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"books-page",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{className:"books-title",children:"My Borrowed Books"}),books.length===0?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{style:{textAlign:"center",opacity:0.7},children:"You have not borrowed any books yet."}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"books-grid",children:books.map((b,i)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"book-card",onClick:()=>navigate(`/book/${encodeURIComponent(b.title)}/${encodeURIComponent(b.author)}/${encodeURIComponent(b.cover)}`),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:b.cover,alt:b.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:b.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:b.author})]},i))})]});}export default BorrowedBooks;
